positive: Minimalist illustration of a stylized crescent moon cradling a glowing, abstract geometric forest. The forest elements are clean, symmetrical, and constructed from interconnected line art and organic shapes resembling crystalline trees and glowing vines. The overall aesthetic is celestial whimsy meets modern boho chic. Use a limited color palette of deep navy blue, warm mustard yellow, and soft mint green, with a primary focus on black line work for contrast. The composition must be perfectly centered and easily printable on fabric, featuring sharp, crisp edges and negative space. Highly detailed vector illustration, isolated on a clean white background, suitable for screen printing, symmetrical, art deco influence, high contrast, clean silhouette, digital art.
